nodes.title: BCM PD (19 Dec 2022)
nodes.description: Business Continuity Management policy document issued 19 December 2022 — under review, overlapping the RRP framework on continuity of critical functions.

nodes.title: FSA 2013 §143
nodes.description: Financial Services Act 2013, section 143 — power to issue standards, the statutory basis for the BCM policy document.
